case_title: WARREN OSBORNE VS. NORTH POINT APARTMENTS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSBORNE, WARREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTH POINT APARTMENTS $35.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $130.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
